name: Country Pork Chop Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a heavy skillet. Brown pork chops.
2. Add chopped onions and apple to the skillet. Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
3. Drain the Veg-all, reserving the liquid.
4. Stir in the reserved liquid, chicken broth, and sugar. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until the pork chops are cooked through, about 25 minutes. Remove the pork chops from the skillet.
5. Return the skillet to the heat. Bring the liquid to a boil. Stir in the vegetables and rice. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
6. Serve the pork chops on top of the rice.
